weber-webercol-fix.name: webercol fix
weber-webercol-fix.description: Ready-mix cement-based tile adhesive for internal use. Water resistant with strong bonding effect. Thixotropic, crack-resistant, non-slump.
weber-webercol-fix.mix_ratio: 4-4.8 L water per 20 kg; 5-6 L per 25 kg
application_areas: Interior bathrooms, kitchens, regular rooms, stairs
Ceramic tiles (not for gypsum substrates or pools)

weber-tile-fix.name: WEBER TILE FIX
weber-tile-fix.description: Weber's basic cement-based tile adhesive (also known as webercol fix plus in some markets). Ready-mix, polymer-modified, water resistant with slip resistance.

weber-webercol-pro.name: WEBER COL PRO
weber-webercol-pro.description: Ready-mix cement-based tile adhesive modified with redispersible polymer. Non-sagging slip-resistant with extended open time. For internal walls/floors and external floors. Can become S1-deformable when mixed with weberad 225 MB.
weber-webercol-pro.classification: C2TE (EN 12004); S1 with weberad 225 MB additive
application_areas: Deformable version (with weberad 225 MB) for heated floors

weber-webercol-plus.name: WEBER COL PLUS
weber-webercol-plus.description: Ready-mix cement-based high-performance polymer 'latex' modified tile adhesive for internal and external use. Strong bonding effect for large tiles or permanent humidity exposure. Low Dust technology (90% reduction).
application_areas: Ceramic, sandstone, granite, marble, porcelain tiles

weber-webercol-premium.name: WEBER COL PREMIUM
weber-webercol-premium.description: Two-component, high-performance cementitious flexible tile adhesive (latex modified). For internal and external use in damp environments. Water resistant, S1 deformable.
application_areas: Large-format tiles on interior/exterior floors and walls

weber-webercol-epo-plus.name: WEBERCOL EPO PLUS
weber-webercol-epo-plus.description: 100% reactive, solvent-free, water-cleanable, thin-bed epoxy tile adhesive. Chemical resistant, waterproof, moisture insensitive. Fast curing, non-sag formulation.
application_areas: Ceramic, vitrified, stone tiles on cement boards, concrete, steel/metal

weber-weberjoint-deco.name: WEBER JOINT DECO
weber-weberjoint-deco.description: High-performance polymer-modified tile grout with non-shading colour technology. High stain resistance, anti-crack, very low water absorption. Wide range of attractive colours.
weber-weberjoint-deco.grouting_wait_floors: 14 days (min 3 days for walls) after traditional site-mix mortar
application_areas: Interior and exterior floor/wall tile grouting

weber-weberjoint-perfect.name: WEBER JOINT PERFECT
weber-weberjoint-perfect.description: High-performance, low-stain cementitious tile grout with Hydro Repell and Mould Stop technologies. Pre-mixed non-shrink grout for wet and dry areas. Ideal for swimming pools.

weber-weberepox-easy.name: WEBERPOX EASY
weber-weberepox-easy.description: 100% reactive, 2-component epoxy tile grout and tile adhesive with easy water-cleanable properties. Chemical resistant, high strength, non-sag, stain resistant. Maintains workability after 1 hour at 40°C.
weber-weberepox-easy.classification: RG / RG2 reactive resin grout (EN 13888); exceeds ANSI A118.3

weber-webertec-mc1.name: WEBERTEC MC1
weber-webertec-mc1.description: Durable mono-component micro concrete with selected sand and aggregates, special cement, green binders and additives. Flowable consistency for congested areas. Shrinkage-compensating for high compressive strength and durability.
weber-webertec-mc1.thickness_range: 30-200 mm per layer (up to 300 mm with reinforcement)

weber-webertec-301.name: WEBERTEC 301
weber-webertec-301.description: Ready-to-use non-shrink structural grout. Shrinkage-compensating mortar with excellent adhesion. Used where high compressive strength and shock/vibration resistance are required.

weber-webertec-grout-p.name: WEBERTEC GROUT P
weber-webertec-grout-p.description: Ready-to-use free-flow cementitious non-shrink precision grout made of sand, special cement and additives. Easy handling with no bleed and zero shrinkage.

weber-weberep-360-ffr.name: WEBER REP 360 FFR
weber-weberep-360-ffr.description: Pre-mixed cementitious paste for fair-face concrete. Dry pre-mixed coating based on hydraulic binders, siliceous filler, water retaining agents and admixtures. Available in white and grey.
application_areas: Repair of honeycombing in fair-face concrete

weber-weberep-331-tx.name: WEBER REP 331TX
weber-weberep-331-tx.description: Ready-to-use non-shrink thixotropic repair mortar with fiber reinforcement. Made of sand (reconstituted grain size), special cement, fibres and additives. High strength, high adhesion, compactness, non-shrinking. Applied manually or by spraying.
application_areas: Edges of steps and load-bearing structures

weber-weberep-epo-412-cry-plus.name: WEBER REP EPO 412 CRY PLUS
weber-weberep-epo-412-cry-plus.description: High strength, thixotropic epoxy patching and bonding paste. Two-component epoxy. Bonding agent for fresh-to-old concrete, patching, and sealant for injection-crack repair systems (used with weberep epo 650 i).
application_areas: Epoxy patching and bonding of concrete

weber-weberanc-405-bfx.name: WEBERANC 405 BFX
weber-weberanc-405-bfx.description: Pure epoxy anchoring resin in cartridge. Two-component high-strength pure epoxy chemical anchoring system. Specifically for heavy loads, anchoring rebar and studs in solid concrete.

weber-webertec-epo-430-grt-plus.name: WEBERTEC EPO 430 GRT PLUS
weber-webertec-epo-430-grt-plus.description: Three-component high-flow epoxy grout: resin, hardener and specific fillers. Very resistant, waterproof, non-shrink resin grout. Fluid consistency for precision grouting/bedding.

weber-weberfloor-epo-patch.name: WEBERFLOOR EPO PATCH
weber-weberfloor-epo-patch.description: Two-component solvent-free epoxy product. Specifically for repairing minor imperfections in concrete substrates and for levelling floors before application of floor coatings, self-levelling, screeds or decorative flooring.
application_areas: Minor imperfection patching under decorative flooring

weber-webertec-epo-450-pc.name: WEBERTEC EPO 450 PC
weber-webertec-epo-450-pc.description: Three-component epoxy mortar. Specifically for pile capping treatment.
weber-webertec-epo-450-pc.classification: Three-component epoxy mortar for PCT (Pile Cap Treatment)
application_areas: Pile cap treatment under waterproofing membranes

weber-weber-sp-33.name: WEBER SP 33
weber-weber-sp-33.description: One-coat high-bonding ready-mix plaster for lightweight blocks. Fibre-reinforced cement-lime ready-mix plaster for traditional masonry rendering.

weber-weber-sp-11.name: WEBER SP 11
weber-weber-sp-11.description: Pre-blended sand-cement ready-mix plaster for internal plastering on blockwork and concrete surfaces before painting. Factory-controlled blend for consistent quality.
application_areas: Internal plaster on block and concrete walls

weber-weberdry-360-pu.name: WEBERDRY 360 PU
weber-weberdry-360-pu.description: One-component liquid-applied polyurethane waterproofing membrane. Creates a continuous watertight seal with excellent adhesion to concrete, metal, bitumen membranes and acrylic paints. Allows moisture vapour transmission.
weber-weberdry-360-pu.notes: All cracks and expansion joints must be sealed with weber jointseal PU before application

weber-weberdry-110-fx.name: WEBERDRY 110 FX
weber-weberdry-110-fx.description: Two-component polymer-modified cementitious waterproof coating. Powder (cements, fillers, admixtures) + liquid (resins, additives). Cures to an elastomeric, waterproof, flexible membrane suitable for potable water tanks, reservoirs, canals, tunnels.
weber-weberdry-110-fx.notes: For use with webercol flex adhesive when tiling over. Certified for potable water contact.

weber-weberdry-116-fx.name: WEBERDRY 116 FX
weber-weberdry-116-fx.description: Flexible cement-based acrylic waterproof coating. Two-component polymer-modified slurry applied to concrete and mortar structures to prevent water infiltration. Used under interior/exterior ceramic tiles.

weber-weberdry-rbe.name: WEBERDRY RBE
weber-weberdry-rbe.description: Rubberized bitumen emulsion protective coating. Dries to form a black, flexible, seamless waterproofing film. Excellent adhesion to most building substrates. Single-component, non-flammable, easy to apply.

coverage.notes: 400-500 microns WFT, 160-200 microns DFT per coat

application_areas: Roof maintenance (concrete, lightweight screed, timber, slate)
weber-weberdry-rbe.notes: Two-coat application recommended; second coat at right angles to first

weber-weberdry-rbv.name: WEBERDRY RBV
weber-weberdry-rbv.description: Ready-to-use cold-applied bitumen emulsion modified with SBR (Styrene Butadiene Rubber). Provides a tough, durable, elastic protective coating. Higher performance rubberized bitumen than RBE.

weber-weberdry-roof.name: WEBERDRY ROOF
weber-weberdry-roof.description: Acrylic-based mono-component premium waterproof coating for roofs. Forms seamless durable membrane, highly flexible, UV-resistant, rain and ponded-water resistant. Used as stand-alone roof coating or topcoat.

weber-weberdry-fabric-fx.name: WEBERDRY FABRIC FX
weber-weberdry-fabric-fx.description: Reinforcing fabric for use in combination with PU-based and cementitious waterproofing membranes. Improves strength, durability, and crack-bridging of the waterproofing system. Used at wall-floor joints, cracks, corners.
weber-weberdry-fabric-fx.notes: Apply 5-10 cm stripe overlapping between sheets

weber-weberdry-150-blc.name: WEBERDRY 150 BLC
weber-weberdry-150-blc.description: Fast-setting hydraulic cement plugging mortar. Instantly and durably stops slight or serious water leaks. Hardens in less than 1 minute and slightly expands during setting. Can be used underwater; resists very high pressure; prevents corrosion.
application_areas: Instant stopping of active water leaks
Sealing water ingress in underground structures

weber-weberfloor-epo-coat.name: WEBERFLOOR EPO COAT
weber-weberfloor-epo-coat.description: Two-component, very low VOC, pigmented solvent-free epoxy floor coating. Self-levelling with excellent smoothness. Heavy-duty pigmented coating for basements, warehouses, industrial factories, ground floor car parks, and traffic decks (no structural movement).
application_areas: Ground floor car parks, traffic decks

weber-weberfloor-topcoat-pu.name: WEBERFLOOR TOPCOAT PU
weber-weberfloor-topcoat-pu.description: Two-component, solvent-based aliphatic isocyanate polyurethane coating. UV-stable with high durability, flexibility, and resistance to abrasion and chemicals. Used as protective topcoat over epoxy or flooring systems.

weber-weberfloor-rapid.name: WEBERFLOOR RAPID
weber-weberfloor-rapid.description: Rapid-drying, ready-to-use polymer-modified hydraulic binder, shrinkage-controlled semi-dry floor screed. Improves quality, strength and drying speed over standard cement screeds. Compliant with EN 13892-1, EN 13813, BS 8204 part 1.
weber-weberfloor-rapid.classification: EN 13892-1 / EN 13813 / BS 8204 part 1 — semi-dry screed
application_areas: Bonded, unbonded, and floating floor screeds

weber-weberfloor-smooth-fd.name: WEBERFLOOR SMOOTH FD
weber-weberfloor-smooth-fd.description: Fine smoothing and low-shrinkage flooring levelling compound with fast-drying property. Fast covering (12-48 hours) with different floor finishes. For interior levelling 1-10 mm on new or existing substrates.

weber-weberfloor-525-fd.name: WEBERFLOOR 525 FD
weber-weberfloor-525-fd.description: Fast-drying, low-shrinking self-levelling cementitious underlayment flooring compound. For internal smoothing and levelling 2-30 mm. Fast covering (24 hours) with all kinds of floor coverings. Alkalinity barrier >5 mm thickness.
application_areas: Thin levelling under vinyl, linoleum, tiles
weber-weberfloor-525-fd.notes: Interior only; not industrial; not for thicknesses >30 mm

weber-weberfloor-535-fd.name: WEBERFLOOR 535 FD
weber-weberfloor-535-fd.description: Fast-drying, HIGH STRENGTH, low-shrinking self-levelling cementitious underlayment. Same thickness range as 525 FD (2-30 mm) but with higher compressive strength. Fast covering at 24 hours. Excellent for high-load areas.
weber-weberfloor-535-fd.classification: Polymer-modified fast-drying high-strength self-levelling cementitious underlayment

weber-webercol-prime.name: WEBERCOL PRIME
weber-webercol-prime.description: Specially formulated acrylic dispersion primer for use before tiling to improve application and adhesion of tile adhesives. Prevents over-rapid absorption of water into very absorbent substrates such as foamed concrete blocks.

weber-weberfloor-4716.name: WEBERFLOOR 4716
weber-weberfloor-4716.description: Styrene acrylate dispersion primer for use prior to application of screeds and self-levelling compounds (weberfloor 535 FD, smooth FD, 525 FD, etc.). Pore sealer preventing air bubbles; prolongs flow life and workability. Dilutable with water. No ammonia. Alkali-resistant.
weber-weberfloor-4716.classification: Styrene acrylate dispersion primer (acrylic) for flooring systems
application_areas: Creating bond between concrete substrate and cement overlays
weber-weberfloor-4716.notes: Not for painted floors, metal substrates, non-porous substrates, or fresh concrete

weber-weber-jointseal-pu-300.name: WEBER JOINT SEAL PU 300
weber-weber-jointseal-pu-300.description: One-component polyurethane sealant for sealing expansion joints, construction joints, and movement joints. Moisture-curing, elastic.
application_areas: Crack sealing before PU waterproofing membranes
